title: Logical error: 'Statistics 'countmin' does not support estimate data type of LowCardinality(Nullable(Date))'.
description:
```sql
SET allow_experimental_statistics=1, optimize_move_to_prewhere=1, move_all_conditions_to_prewhere=1, enable_multiple_prewhere_read_steps=1, move_primary_key_columns_to_end_of_prewhere=1, allow_reorder_prewhere_conditions=1, allow_statistics_optimize=1, allow_suspicious_low_cardinality_types=1;
CREATE TABLE test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_19 (`primary_key` String STATISTICS(CountMin), `normal_column` String STATISTICS(CountMin), `value` LowCardinality(UInt32) STATISTICS(TDigest), `date` LowCardinality(Nullable(Date)) STATISTICS(CountMin)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY primary_key;
INSERT INTO test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_19 SELECT hex(number % 100) AS primary_key, ['hello', 'world', 'test', 'example', 'sample'][(number % 5) + 1] AS normal_column, (number % 1000) + 1 AS value, toDate('2025-08-01') + number AS date FROM numbers(10);
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_19 WHERE (date = '2025-08-05') AND (lower(primary_key) = '00') AND (normal_column != 'hello') AND (value < 100);
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_20 (`id` INT UNSIGNED, `name` VARCHAR(255), `created_at` DATETIME NULL, `status` VARCHAR(255) NULL) ENGINE = InnoDB;

INSERT INTO test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_20 (id, name, created_at, status) SELECT number, CASE WHEN number % 3 = 1 THEN 'active' WHEN number % 3 = 2 THEN 'inactive' ELSE 'pending' END, DATE_ADD('2025-08-01 12:00:00', INTERVAL number SECOND), CASE WHEN number % 2 = 0 THEN 'active' ELSE NULL END FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS number FROM (SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) AS a, (SELECT @rownum := -1) AS r) AS numbers;
CREATE TABLE test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_21 (`user_id` INT UNSIGNED, `email` VARCHAR(255), `signup_date` DATE NULL, `last_login` DATETIME NULL) ENGINE = InnoDB;

INSERT INTO test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_21 (user_id, email, signup_date, last_login) SELECT number, CONCAT('user', number, '@example.com'), DATE_ADD('2025-08-01', INTERVAL number DAY), DATE_ADD('2025-09-01 08:00:00', INTERVAL number SECOND) FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS number FROM (SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) AS a, (SELECT @rownum := -1) AS r) AS numbers;
SELECT * FROM test_improve_prewhere__fuzz_21 WHERE (signup_date IS NOT NULL) AND (last_login < '2025-09-05 00:00:00') AND (email LIKE '%@example.com');
